import json, re, unicodedata, os, textwrap, sys, itertools

quran_path="/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path="/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"

def load_json(path):
    with open(path,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
        return json.load(f)
quran=load_json(quran_path)
len(quran), list(quran[0].keys())[:5]

# normalization helper
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0657-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
def normalize(s):
    s = re.sub('[\u0640]', '', s)  # tatweel
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)  # remove tashkeel
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)  # remove punctuation
    s = s.replace('إ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

target_full = "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُسِيرُ بِهِ نَفْسُهُ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ"
norm_target = normalize(target_full)
norm_target

# search for verses containing bigrams, look for overlap
cands=[]
for v in quran:
    text=v['ayah_text']
    ntext=normalize(text)
    # compute token overlap
    tokens=set(ntext.split())
    target_tokens=set(norm_target.split())
    common=len(tokens & target_tokens)
    if 'ولقد خلقنا الانسان' in ntext or 'ونحن اقرب اليه' in ntext or 'ولكن لا تبصرون' in ntext:
        cands.append((common, v))
# Sort by common descending
cands_sorted=sorted(cands, key=lambda x: -x[0])
[(c[0], c[1]['surah_name'], c[1]['ayah_id'], c[1]['ayah_text'])[:3] for c in cands_sorted[:10]]

qaf16 = [v['ayah_text'] for v in quran if v['surah_name']=='ق' and v['ayah_id']==16][0]
waq85 = [v['ayah_text'] for v in quran if v['surah_name']=='الواقعة' and v['ayah_id']==85][0]
combined = qaf16 + " " + waq85
combined
